name: Jindal Cotex Limited
summary: Jindal Cotex Limited manufactures and sells yarns in India and internationally. It operates in two segments, Textile and Energy Generation. The Textile segment produces and trades in acrylic, polyester, poly/cotton blended, cotton, and other blended yarns and knitted clothes. The Energy Generation segment is involved in the generation and sale of energy from the windmill. Jindal Cotex Limited was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Ludhiana, India.
